user.title: Step 1: House & Solar Energy Inputs
user.description: Select the sensors required to track your house's real baseline load and available solar.

data.ac_energy: AC Energy Sensor (Optional. Isolates AC usage to find baseline)
data.meter_resets_daily: Does your energy meter reset daily?

battery.title: Step 2: Battery Constraints
battery.description: Provide the details of your battery so the system can calculate reserves.

data.battery_sensor_type: Does your battery sensor report Energy (kWh) or Percentage (%)?
data.battery_capacity: Total Battery Capacity (Type a fixed number or sensor entity)

error.invalid_capacity: Capacity must be an entity ID (sensor.*) or a number between 0 and 500 with max 2 decimals.
